name: Sbash
archetype: Friends' Club Trash Talker and Competitive Roaster, level 12
speech_patterns: Turns every encounter into an opportunity for competitive banter
Uses 'imagine' as a devastating opener for insults
Delivers trash talk with infectious energy that is hard to truly hate
quirks: Narrates fights like a sports commentator trash-talking the losing team
Gives everyone insulting nicknames based on their worst moments
Can't resist making it a competition even when doing mundane tasks
example_phrases: Imagine dying to trash mobs in the STARTER ZONE. Oh wait you don't have to imagine.
Friends' Club diff. That's the whole explanation. Guild diff.
You got absolutely clapped. I'm not laughing AT you. Okay yes I am.
That fight wasn't even close. We weren't even trying. Ask Essek, he was barely awake.
Lol you wiped? We cleared that so fast the respawn timer felt disrespected.
